title: Cobblemon Radar
description: Cobblemon Radar is a powerful utility mod for Cobblemon that helps you locate and track nearby Pokémon with ease. Compatible with Cobbleverse!
body:
Cobblemon Radar is a utility mod for Cobblemon that allows you to locate and track nearby Pokémon with advanced filtering and real-time visual feedback.

It is designed for efficient Pokémon hunting, Pokédex completion, and general exploration support.

## ✨ Features
- Pokémon name search
- Real-time tracking beams for nearby targets
- Advanced filters:
  - Legendary / Mythical / Ultra Beast
  - Shiny Pokémon
  - Hidden Abilities
  - Uncaught Pokémon
  - Natures
  - Genders

![Cobblemon Radar filter options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68aaaebd256befab94e16775f48be20d0a71b435.png)

## 🛠️ How to Use
- Press **Delete** to open the radar menu
- Use Pokémon and Nature search fields to filter targets
  - Multiple entries are supported using commas
  - Example: "charizard, jolteon, cindaq"
- Enable filters using checkboxes
- Use the Gender toggle to filter tracked Pokémon
- Click Apply to update the radar

![Cobblemon radar beams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e89a44c9095bbb13a98493b89df35deccacec83.png)

## 🧪 Compatibility
- Tested in singleplayer and multiplayer with standard Cobblemon
- Tested with Cobbleverse (singleplayer & multiplayer)
- Client-side safe and lightweight

## ⚠️ Multiplayer Behavior
- Hidden Ability and Nature filters work fully in singleplayer. On multiplayer servers, these filters require the mod to be installed server-side
- Your own Pokémon and other players’ Pokémon are not tracked

## 💬 Feedback
- If you encounter issues or have suggestions, feel free to leave feedback or report bugs.
